segments.text: A brief history of ice cream in India.
In the 16th century, the Mughals brought the concept of frozen desserts to India.
Kulfi, India's traditional ice cream, is made by reducing milk until it thickens.
The first modern ice cream factory in India was established by the Kwality Group in 1956.
Today, India is one of the fastest-growing ice cream markets in the world.
